summary: Score UP from 3.3 to 3.7. Nameplate idle guard and whiteboard dark mode fixes from review #16 landed well. Fun factor remains strongest. Main concerns: performance (concurrent animation overload), accessibility gaps, CSS dead code carried from previous reviews.

suggestions.title: Coffee corner vibe text uses wrong CSS class selector
suggestions.description: Office.css targets .coffee-corner-label but JSX renders className='coffee-corner__label'. The ::after pseudo-elements for TRIPLE SHOT, STRONG NOW etc never render. Flagged in review #16, still broken. Fix: change CSS selectors to .coffee-corner__label.

suggestions.title: No visible focus indicators on interactive characters
suggestions.description: Characters have tabIndex={0} and role='button' when clickable, but zero visible focus styles. Add :focus-visible outline to .char elements.

suggestions.title: Too many concurrent CSS animations
suggestions.description: Office view runs 7+ ambient particles, dust drift, plant sway, coffee steam, star twinkle, manager wobble, wander paths ALL at once. Add will-change, pause off-screen animations.

suggestions.title: Duplicated dust-drift keyframe causes style conflict
suggestions.description: @keyframes dust-drift defined twice with different animations. Browser uses last definition, breaking ::before dust effect. Rename one to dust-mote-drift.

suggestions.title: ghost-float keyframe defined twice
suggestions.description: @keyframes ghost-float appears twice in Office.css. Remove the duplicate.

suggestions.title: WorkerCard memoization defeated by array reference
suggestions.description: WorkerCard is React.memo'd but receives full activityEntries array each poll, defeating memoization. Memoize per-worker activity slices.

suggestions.title: Color-only progress bar differentiation
suggestions.description: Progress bar fill color is the only status indicator. Add text or pattern for colorblind users.

suggestions.title: No background tab notification on worker events
suggestions.description: Toast/confetti invisible when tab backgrounded. Use Notification API or persist event in title until tab focused.

suggestions.title: Reduced-motion selectors target nonexistent classes
suggestions.description: prefers-reduced-motion targets .office-worker, .worker-standby which don't exist. Should target .char--working, .char--ghost, .char--manager.

suggestions.title: Mobile conference table overlaps idle wander paths
suggestions.description: On <480px, conference table at 62% overlaps wander paths (73-87%). Characters walk through table.

suggestions.title: Activity log no local persistence
suggestions.description: Activity fetched fresh each load with no localStorage cache. History lost if activity.json cleared.
